name: video-editor
title: Video Editor
description: Timeline + Konva canvas video editor for Next.js with shadcn/ui

files.content:
/** Shape / object presets for the left panel */

export const SHAPE_PRESETS = [
	{
		id: "rect-orange",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#ea580c", borderRadius: 4 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#ea580c", stroke: "#18181b", strokeWidth: 2, cornerRadius: 8 },
		size: { width: 200, height: 120 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-purple",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#7c3aed", borderRadius: 4 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#7c3aed", stroke: "", strokeWidth: 0, cornerRadius: 12 },
		size: { width: 200, height: 120 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-blue",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#3b82f6", borderRadius: 0 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#3b82f6", stroke: "#1e40af", strokeWidth: 3, cornerRadius: 0 },
		size: { width: 220, height: 100 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-red",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#ef4444", borderRadius: 6 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#ef4444", stroke: "#991b1b", strokeWidth: 2, cornerRadius: 6 },
		size: { width: 180, height: 110 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-teal",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#14b8a6", borderRadius: 16 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#14b8a6", stroke: "", strokeWidth: 0, cornerRadius: 16 },
		size: { width: 200, height: 100 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-pink",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#f472b6", borderRadius: 0 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#f472b6", stroke: "#db2777", strokeWidth: 2, cornerRadius: 0 },
		size: { width: 160, height: 160 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-lime",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#84cc16", borderRadius: 8 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#84cc16", stroke: "#4d7c0f", strokeWidth: 2, cornerRadius: 8 },
		size: { width: 240, height: 80 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-slate",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#64748b", borderRadius: 4 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#64748b", stroke: "#334155", strokeWidth: 1, cornerRadius: 4 },
		size: { width: 200, height: 140 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-cyan",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#06b6d4", borderRadius: 20 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#06b6d4", stroke: "", strokeWidth: 0, cornerRadius: 20 },
		size: { width: 190, height: 90 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-indigo",
		label: "Rectangle",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#6366f1", borderRadius: 2 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#6366f1", stroke: "#4338ca", strokeWidth: 3, cornerRadius: 2 },
		size: { width: 210, height: 130 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-dark",
		label: "Frame",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#18181b", borderRadius: 8 },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#27272a", stroke: "#52525b", strokeWidth: 2, cornerRadius: 16 },
		size: { width: 280, height: 180 },
	},
	{
		id: "rect-white",
		label: "Card",
		shape: "rect",
		preview: { bg: "#ffffff", borderRadius: 8, border: "2px solid #e4e4e7" },
		data: { shape: "rect", fill: "#ffffff", stroke: "#e4e4e7", strokeWidth: 2, cornerRadius: 12 },
		size: { width: 240, height: 140 },
	},
	{
		id: "circle-pink",
		label: "Circle",
		shape: "circle",
		preview: { bg: "#ec4899", borderRadius: "50%" },
		data: { shape: "circle", fill: "#ec4899", stroke: "#be185d", strokeWidth: 2, cornerRadius: 0 },
		size: { width: 120, height: 120 },
	},
	{
		id: "circle-yellow",
		label: "Circle",
		shape: "circle",
		preview: { bg: "#fbbf24", borderRadius: "50%" },
		data: { shape: "circle", fill: "#fbbf24", stroke: "", strokeWidth: 0, cornerRadius: 0 },
		size: { width: 100, height: 100 },
	},
	{
		id: "ellipse-green",
		label: "Ellipse",
		shape: "ellipse",
		preview: { bg: "#22c55e", borderRadius: "50%" },
		data: { shape: "ellipse", fill: "#22c55e", stroke: "#15803d", strokeWidth: 2, cornerRadius: 0 },
		size: { width: 180, height: 100 },
	},
];

/** Icon color presets when adding from picker */
export const ICON_COLOR_PRESETS = [
	"#fbbf24", "#ea580c", "#ef4444", "#ec4899", "#a855f7",
	"#3b82f6", "#06b6d4", "#22c55e", "#ffffff", "#18181b",
];

/** Canva-style text presets — applied when user picks a style */

export const TEXT_PRESETS = [
	{
		id: "plain",
		label: "Add a text box",
		isPlain: true,
		preview: { fontSize: 14, fontWeight: 600, color: "#fff" },
		layer: {
			content: "Your text here",
			fontFamily: "DM Sans",
			fontSize: 36,
			fontWeight: 600,
			fill: "#ffffff",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 0,
			lineHeight: 1.2,
			shadowColor: "rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
			shadowBlur: 4,
			shadowOffsetX: 0,
			shadowOffsetY: 2,
			stroke: "",
			strokeWidth: 0,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "love-joy",
		label: "love and joy",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "Georgia, serif",
			fontStyle: "italic",
			fontSize: 15,
			color: "#374151",
		},
		layer: {
			content: "love and joy",
			fontFamily: "Georgia",
			fontSize: 32,
			fontWeight: 400,
			fill: "#374151",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 1,
			lineHeight: 1.3,
			shadowColor: "transparent",
			shadowBlur: 0,
			shadowOffsetX: 0,
			shadowOffsetY: 0,
			stroke: "",
			strokeWidth: 0,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "welcome-baby",
		label: "welcome little one!",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "DM Sans, sans-serif",
			fontSize: 11,
			fontWeight: 700,
			color: "#7c3aed",
			lineHeight: 1.2,
		},
		subPreview: { fontSize: 9, fontWeight: 800, color: "#18181b", letterSpacing: 1 },
		subContent: "BABY TAYLOR FINN",
		layer: {
			content: "welcome little one!\nBABY TAYLOR FINN",
			fontFamily: "DM Sans",
			fontSize: 22,
			fontWeight: 700,
			fill: "#7c3aed",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 0,
			lineHeight: 1.4,
			shadowColor: "transparent",
			shadowBlur: 0,
			shadowOffsetX: 0,
			shadowOffsetY: 0,
			stroke: "",
			strokeWidth: 0,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "golden-hour",
		label: "GOLDEN HOUR",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "Georgia, serif",
			fontSize: 14,
			fontWeight: 700,
			color: "#b8860b",
			letterSpacing: 2,
		},
		layer: {
			content: "GOLDEN HOUR",
			fontFamily: "Georgia",
			fontSize: 30,
			fontWeight: 700,
			fill: "#c9a227",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 4,
			lineHeight: 1.2,
			shadowColor: "rgba(201,162,39,0.4)",
			shadowBlur: 12,
			shadowOffsetX: 0,
			shadowOffsetY: 2,
			stroke: "",
			strokeWidth: 0,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "thank-you-3d",
		label: "Thank you!",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "DM Sans, sans-serif",
			fontSize: 14,
			fontWeight: 800,
			color: "#fb923c",
			textShadow: "2px 2px 0 #fcd34d, 3px 3px 0 #fef3c7",
		},
		layer: {
			content: "Thank you!",
			fontFamily: "DM Sans",
			fontSize: 34,
			fontWeight: 800,
			fill: "#fb923c",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 0,
			lineHeight: 1.2,
			shadowColor: "#fcd34d",
			shadowBlur: 0,
			shadowOffsetX: 3,
			shadowOffsetY: 3,
			stroke: "#fef3c7",
			strokeWidth: 1,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "glow",
		label: "GLOW",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "Arial, sans-serif",
			fontSize: 16,
			fontWeight: 900,
			color: "#ec4899",
			textShadow: "0 0 8px #ec4899, 0 0 16px #f472b6",
		},
		layer: {
			content: "GLOW",
			fontFamily: "Arial",
			fontSize: 40,
			fontWeight: 900,
			fill: "#ec4899",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 6,
			lineHeight: 1.2,
			shadowColor: "#f472b6",
			shadowBlur: 20,
			shadowOffsetX: 0,
			shadowOffsetY: 0,
			stroke: "",
			strokeWidth: 0,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "thank-you-serif",
		label: "THANK YOU",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "Georgia, serif",
			fontSize: 13,
			fontWeight: 700,
			color: "#dc2626",
			letterSpacing: 1,
		},
		layer: {
			content: "THANK YOU",
			fontFamily: "Georgia",
			fontSize: 28,
			fontWeight: 700,
			fill: "#dc2626",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 3,
			lineHeight: 1.2,
			shadowColor: "transparent",
			shadowBlur: 0,
			shadowOffsetX: 0,
			shadowOffsetY: 0,
			stroke: "#991b1b",
			strokeWidth: 0.5,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "birthday",
		label: "BIRTHDAY",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "Arial Black, Arial, sans-serif",
			fontSize: 13,
			fontWeight: 900,
			color: "#18181b",
			letterSpacing: 1,
		},
		layer: {
			content: "BIRTHDAY",
			fontFamily: "Arial",
			fontSize: 36,
			fontWeight: 900,
			fill: "#18181b",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 4,
			lineHeight: 1.2,
			shadowColor: "rgba(0,0,0,0.2)",
			shadowBlur: 0,
			shadowOffsetX: 2,
			shadowOffsetY: 2,
			stroke: "",

	},
	{

		label: "Big Heading",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "DM Sans, sans-serif",
			fontSize: 15,
			fontWeight: 800,

			fontSize: 48,

			fill: "#ffffff",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: -1,
			lineHeight: 1.1,
			shadowColor: "rgba(0,0,0,0.5)",

			shadowOffsetX: 0,
			shadowOffsetY: 4,
			stroke: "",
			strokeWidth: 0,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "mono-code",
		label: "CODE STYLE",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "Space Mono, monospace",
			fontSize: 11,
			fontWeight: 400,
			color: "#22c55e",

		layer: {

			fontSize: 24,
			fontWeight: 400,
			fill: "#22c55e",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 4,
			lineHeight: 1.3,
			shadowColor: "rgba(34,197,94,0.5)",
			shadowBlur: 8,
			shadowOffsetX: 0,
			shadowOffsetY: 0,
			stroke: "",
			strokeWidth: 0,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "outline-white",
		label: "OUTLINE",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "DM Sans, sans-serif",
			fontSize: 14,
			fontWeight: 800,
			color: "transparent",
			WebkitTextStroke: "1.5px #ffffff",

		layer: {
			content: "OUTLINE",
			fontFamily: "DM Sans",
			fontSize: 38,
			fontWeight: 800,
			fill: "transparent",
			align: "center",
			letterSpacing: 2,
			lineHeight: 1.2,
			shadowColor: "transparent",

			strokeWidth: 2,
		},
	},
	{
		id: "gradient-gold",
		label: "SHINE",
		preview: {
			fontFamily: "Georgia, serif",
			fontSize: 14,
			fontWeight: 700,
			background: "linear-gradient(180deg, #fef3c7, #d97706)",

		layer: {
			content: "SHINE",

			fontSize: 36,
			fontWeight: 700,
			fill: "#fbbf24",
			align: "center",

			shadowOffsetY: 2,

	},
];
